```{r}
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 4.75, y = 4.5, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B66_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr[i]), chromstart = 13710000, chromend = 13750000, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = "#37a7db", ymax = 1, range = c(0,25), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 4.75, y = 5, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 20), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 20), fontsize = 6)
## Add genes
params_e <- pgParams(chrom = paste0("chr",chr[i]), chromstart = start[i], chromend = end[i], 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 4.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
genes_gm <- plotGenes(params = params_e, stroke = 1, fontsize = 6,
                      strandLabels = FALSE,
                      y = 3.5, height = 0.4)
## Annotate genome label
annoGenomeLabel(plot = genes_gm, params = params_e, 
                scale = "Kb", fontsize = 6,
                y = 4)
params_g <- pgParams(chrom = "chr19", chromstart = 13710000, chromend = 13760000, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 4.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
plotGenomeLabel(params = params_g, 
                scale = "Kb", fontsize = 6,
                length = 1.5, y = 5.5)
## Add box around zoom
plotRect(x = 1.5, y = 5, width = 1.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
  lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.25)
plotSegments(x0 = 0.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 2.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")

plotRect(x = 3.5, y = 5, width = 1.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.25)
plotSegments(x0 = 2.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 4.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")

plotRect(x = 5.5, y = 5, width = 1.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.25)
plotSegments(x0 = 4.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 6.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")

plotRect(x = 1.5, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.5)
plotSegments(x0 = 1.45, y0 = 4, x1 = 0.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 1.55, y0 = 4, x1 = 2.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotRect(x = 1.5, y = 5, width = 0.375, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 2, fill = NA, alpha = 1)

plotRect(x = 3.5, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.5)
plotSegments(x0 = 3.45, y0 = 4, x1 = 2.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 3.55, y0 = 4, x1 = 4.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotRect(x = 3.5, y = 5, width = 0.375, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 2, fill = NA, alpha = 1)

plotRect(x = 5.5, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.5)
plotSegments(x0 = 5.45, y0 = 4, x1 = 4.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 5.55, y0 = 4, x1 = 6.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotRect(x = 5.5, y = 5, width = 0.375, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 2, fill = NA, alpha = 1)

## Hide page guides
pageGuideHide()
dev.off()

p_img <- image_read(tmp)
p_img_cropped <- image_trim(p_img)
p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img_cropped, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Fig_2F = p_gg

```

```{r}
WorkingDirectory <- "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/2_TAD/3DNetMod/diff_bound/"
setwd(WorkingDirectory)
options(scipen = 999)

#RNA overlap, average FC over TADs
files=list.files("7_TADs_RNAoverlap/", pattern = "shrinkage_DEGs_")
TAD_rna=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(files)) {
  temp=read.table(paste0("7_TADs_RNAoverlap/",files[[i]]))
  temp$cell = strsplit(files[[i]],"_")[[1]][1]
  temp$anno=strsplit(files[[i]],"_")[[1]][5]
  TAD_rna=rbind(TAD_rna,temp)
}

TAD_rna_sig=TAD_rna[,c(1:3,8,10,13,15,16)] %>% unique()
#TAD_rna_sig=TAD_rna_sig[TAD_rna_sig$V13 < 0.05 & abs(TAD_rna_sig$V10)>=1,] %>% unique()
med=median(TAD_rna_sig[,"V10"])
#TAD_rna_sig$V33 = TAD_rna_sig$V33 - med
TAD_rna_sig <- TAD_rna_sig %>% group_by(V1,V2,V3,cell,anno) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(c(V10), mean))

stat.test <- TAD_rna_sig %>%
  group_by(cell) %>%
  t_test(V10 ~ anno) %>%
  #adjust_pvalue(method = "bonferroni") %>%
  add_significance() %>% add_xy_position(fun = "max", x = "anno", group="cell")
stat.test

p = ggplot(TAD_rna_sig, aes(x = anno, y = V10, fill = cell)) + geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE) + stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test[stat.test$group1=="notdynamic",], label = "p.adj.signif", y.position = 3.5, size = 2, remove.bracket = TRUE, hide.ns = TRUE) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + xlab("Boundary Annotation") + ylab("RNA log2FoldChange (DP/DMSO)") + geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype = "dashed") + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 4))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/tad_FC_rna.pdf"))
print(p)
dev.off()

TAD_rna_sig=TAD_rna[,c(1:3,8,10,13,15,16)] %>% unique()
TAD_rna_sig=TAD_rna_sig[TAD_rna_sig$V13 < 0.05 & abs(TAD_rna_sig$V10)>=1,] %>% unique()

for (i in c("B36","B49","B66")) {
  TAD_rna_sig_sorted <- TAD_rna_sig[order(TAD_rna_sig$V10, decreasing = TRUE), ] %>% unique()
  TAD_rna_sig_sorted = TAD_rna_sig_sorted[(TAD_rna_sig_sorted$anno!="notdynamic") & TAD_rna_sig_sorted$cell==i & abs(TAD_rna_sig_sorted$V10) > 1,4:5] %>% unique()
  
  yy <- enrichGO(TAD_rna_sig_sorted$V8, 'org.Hs.eg.db', keyType = "SYMBOL", ont="ALL", pvalueCutoff=0.05, pAdjustMethod = "BH")
  p = dotplot(yy, showCategory=15, font.size = 8)
  
  pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/",i,"tad_switch_go.pdf"))
  print(p)
  dev.off()

  #png(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/",i,"tad_switch_go.png"))
  #print(p)
  #dev.off()
}

TAD_rna_sig=TAD_rna[,c(1:3,8,10,13,15,16)] %>% unique()
 for (i in c("B36","B49","B66")) {
   TAD_rna_sig_sorted <- TAD_rna_sig[order(TAD_rna_sig$V10, decreasing = TRUE), ] %>% unique()
   TAD_rna_sig_sorted = TAD_rna_sig_sorted[(TAD_rna_sig_sorted$anno!="notdynamic") & TAD_rna_sig_sorted$cell==i,4:5] %>% unique()
   
   if (i=="B36") {
     TAD_RNA_genes = TAD_rna_sig_sorted
   } else {
     TAD_RNA_genes = merge(TAD_RNA_genes,TAD_rna_sig_sorted, by.x="V8", by.y="V8")
   }
 }
colnames(TAD_RNA_genes) = c("gene","B36","B49","B66")

# we want the log2 fold change 
B36_orig_gene_list <- TAD_RNA_genes$B36
B49_orig_gene_list <- TAD_RNA_genes$B49
B66_orig_gene_list <- TAD_RNA_genes$B66
# name the vector
names(B36_orig_gene_list) <- TAD_RNA_genes$gene
names(B49_orig_gene_list) <- TAD_RNA_genes$gene
names(B66_orig_gene_list) <- TAD_RNA_genes$gene
# omit any NA values 
B36_gene_list<-na.omit(B36_orig_gene_list)
B49_gene_list<-na.omit(B49_orig_gene_list)
B66_gene_list<-na.omit(B66_orig_gene_list)
# sort the list in decreasing order (required for clusterProfiler)
B36_gene_list = sort(B36_gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)
B49_gene_list = sort(B49_gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)
B66_gene_list = sort(B66_gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

h_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "H") %>% dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)
gsea_B36 <- GSEA(geneList = B36_gene_list, TERM2GENE = h_df, nPermSimple = 100000)
gsea_B49 <- GSEA(geneList = B49_gene_list, TERM2GENE = h_df, nPermSimple = 100000)
gsea_B66 <- GSEA(geneList = B66_gene_list, TERM2GENE = h_df, nPermSimple = 100000)

merged_gsea = merge_result(list(B36=gsea_B36,B49=gsea_B49,B66=gsea_B66))
p = dotplot(merged_gsea, showCategory=15, split=".sign", font.size = 10) + theme(legend.text=element_text(size=5)) + facet_grid(.~.sign)

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/tad_merged_gsea_rna.pdf"))
print(p)
dev.off()

Fig_2G = p

```

```{r}
#Fig2
layout <- "A#CCCCCCC##EEEEJJJJ##
           A#CCCCCCC##FFFFKKKK##
           A#CCCCCCCDDGGGGLLLLOO
           A#CCCCCCC##HHHHMMMM##
           B#CCCCCCC##IIIINNNN##
           PPPPRRRRRRRRRRRSSSSSS
           PPPPRRRRRRRRRRRSSSSSS
           QQQQRRRRRRRRRRRSSSSSS
           QQQQRRRRRRRRRRRSSSSSS
           "
           
Fig2B1=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_weakened_top50_B36_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2B2=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_weakened_top50_B49_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2B3=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_weakened_top50_B66_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2B4=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_weakened_top50_NHA_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2B5=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_weakened_top50_qNHA_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2C1=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_strengthened_top50_B36_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2C2=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_strengthened_top50_B49_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2C3=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_strengthened_top50_B66_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2C4=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_strengthened_top50_NHA_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Fig2C5=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/dynamic_strengthened_top50_qNHA_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]


Fig2 <- wrap_plots(Fig2A1, Fig2A1_leg, as.grob(Fig_2A2), Fig_2A2_leg, Fig2B1, Fig2B2, Fig2B3, Fig2B4, Fig2B5,
                   Fig2C1, Fig2C2, Fig2C3, Fig2C4, Fig2C5, Fig_2B_leg, Fig_2D, Fig_2E,Fig_2F, Fig_2G, design = layout) &
    theme(plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/Full_Figure2.pdf"), width = 24, height = 24)
print(Fig2)
dev.off()

#Supp Fig3
layout <- "AAAAABBBBBEEEEE##
           AAAAABBBBBEEEEE##
           CCCCCDDDDDFFFFF##
           CCCCCDDDDDFFFFF##
           ############GGG##
           ############HHH##
           ############IIILL
           ############JJJ##
           ############KKK##
           "
           
Supp_Fig3G1=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/not_dynamic_B36_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Supp_Fig3G2=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/not_dynamic_B49_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Supp_Fig3G3=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/not_dynamic_B66_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Supp_Fig3G4=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/not_dynamic_NHA_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]
Supp_Fig3G5=plots[["./5_aggregate_boundaries/not_dynamic_qNHA_DMSO_minus_DP_agg_10kb_VC_SQRT.pdf"]]


Supp_Fig3 <- wrap_plots(Supp_3A, Supp_3B, Supp_3C, Supp_3D, Supp_3E, Supp_3F, Supp_Fig3G1, Supp_Fig3G2, Supp_Fig3G3,
                   Supp_Fig3G4, Supp_Fig3G5, Fig_2B_leg, design = layout) &
    theme(plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/Full_Supp_Figure3.pdf"), width = 24, height = 24)
print(Supp_Fig3)
dev.off()

```

```{r}
#test = read.csv("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/2_TAD/cremins_pipe/DI_overlap/4_dynamic_boundary/dynamic_sig_withDI_slop50kb_ctcf_uniq.bed", sep = "\t", header = FALSE)
test = bound_ctcf[,c(21:23,21:23)]
test$V22 = test$V22.1 - 5000
test$V23 = test$V23.1 + 5000
colnames(test) <- c("seqnames", "start", "end", "chr","peak_start","peak_end")
gr <- test %>% mutate(region_name = str_c(seqnames, start, end, sep = ":")) %>% as_granges()
B36_methylc <- list.files("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/data/wgbs/methylcall/6_track_mergedCG", pattern = "Trimmed_WGBS_B36_", full.names = TRUE) %>% grep("_DMSO_|_DP_", ., value = TRUE) %>% grep("CG.methylC.gz$", ., value = TRUE)
B49_methylc <- list.files("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/data/wgbs/methylcall/6_track_mergedCG", pattern = "Trimmed_WGBS_B49_", full.names = TRUE) %>% grep("_DMSO_|_DP_", ., value = TRUE) %>% grep("CG.methylC.gz$", ., value = TRUE)
B66_methylc <- list.files("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/data/wgbs/methylcall/6_track_mergedCG", pattern = "Trimmed_WGBS_B66_", full.names = TRUE) %>% grep("_DMSO_|_DP_", ., value = TRUE) %>% grep(".CG.methylC.gz$", ., value = TRUE)
#NHA_methylc <- list.files("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/data/wgbs/methylcall/6_track_mergedCG", pattern = "Trimmed_WGBS_NHA_", full.names = TRUE) %>% grep("_DMSO_|_DP_", ., value = TRUE) %>% grep("CG.methylC.gz$", ., value = TRUE)
#qNHA_methylc <- list.files("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/data/wgbs/methylcall/6_track_mergedCG", pattern = "Trimmed_WGBS_qNHA_", full.names = TRUE) %>% grep("_DMSO_|_DP_", ., value = TRUE) %>% grep(".CG.methylC.gz$", ., value = TRUE)

# Read in these files and filter for regions with greater than 5x coverage
read_in_methlylation <- function(file_list){
  #file_list <- HCT116_methylc
  #file_names <- basename(file_list) %>% str_split_i(., "trimmed_", 2) %>% str_split_i(., ".CG.me*", 1)
  file_names <- basename(file_list) %>% str_split_i(., ".CG.me*", 1)
  read_in <- map(file_list, read_delim, col_names = c("seqnames", "start", "end", "type", "score", "strand", "depth"))
  read_in_filt <- map(read_in, filter, depth > 5)
  renamed <- GRangesList()
  for(i in seq_along(read_in_filt)){
    #i <- 2
    df <- read_in_filt[[i]]
    colnames(df)[5] <- file_names[i]
    gr <- df %>% dplyr::select(1:3, 5) %>%  as_granges()
    renamed[[i]] <- gr
  }
  # Create a joint region set for all of the methylation data
  red <- Reduce(intersect, renamed)
  # Subset each sample by this joint region set
  grl_shared <- GRangesList(lapply(renamed, function(x) {
    subsetByOverlaps(x, red)
  }))
  grl_comb <- grl_shared %>% map(., as.data.frame) %>% map(~ {
    .x %>%
      # Add a column containing the range info
      mutate(ranges = str_c(as.character(seqnames), ":", start, "-", end)) %>%
      # Select this column and non-NA columns (left over from previous steps)
      dplyr::select(ranges, where(~ !any(is.na(.x)))) %>%
      # Remove the seqnames, start, end, width, and strand columns
      dplyr::select(-c(seqnames, start, end, width, strand))
    # Join the data frames
  }) %>% purrr::reduce(., inner_join, by = "ranges")
  # Separate the regions column used for merging back into GenomicRanges syntax and then reconvert back to GRanges
  gr_comp <- grl_comb %>% separate(ranges, into = c("seqnames", "start", "end"), sep = "[:-]", remove = TRUE, convert = TRUE) %>% as_granges()
  
  return(gr_comp)
}
B36_methyl_gr <- read_in_methlylation(B36_methylc)
B49_methyl_gr <- read_in_methlylation(B49_methylc)
B66_methyl_gr <- read_in_methlylation(B66_methylc)
#NHA_methyl_gr <- read_in_methlylation(NHA_methylc)
#qNHA_methyl_gr <- read_in_methlylation(qNHA_methylc)

temp_methyl <- join_overlap_left(gr, B36_methyl_gr) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(region_name2 = str_c(.$seqnames, .$start, .$end, sep = ":")) %>% distinct(region_name2, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% dplyr::select(-c(seqnames, start, end, width, strand, region_name2))

temp_methyl1 <- join_overlap_left(gr, B49_methyl_gr) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(region_name2 = str_c(.$seqnames, .$start, .$end, sep = ":")) %>% distinct(region_name2, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% dplyr::select(-c(seqnames, start, end, width, strand, region_name2))

temp_methyl2 <- join_overlap_left(gr, B66_methyl_gr) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(region_name2 = str_c(.$seqnames, .$start, .$end, sep = ":")) %>% distinct(region_name2, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% dplyr::select(-c(seqnames, start, end, width, strand, region_name2))


joint_methyl <- cbind(temp_methyl,temp_methyl1)
joint_methyl <- cbind(joint_methyl,temp_methyl2)
joint_methyl <- joint_methyl[,c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,13,14,15,16,21,22,23,24)]

setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/2_TAD/cremins_pipe/DI_overlap")
bound_ctcf = read.csv("4_dynamic_boundary/dynamic_sig_withDI_new_slop50kb_ctcf_merged_sumctcf.bed", sep = "\t", header = FALSE)
#test = bound_ctcf %>% 
#  group_by(V1, V2,V3) %>% slice_max(abs(V37))
#bound_ctcf = test
joint_methyl$region_name = paste0(joint_methyl$chr,":",joint_methyl$peak_start,":",joint_methyl$peak_end)
bound_ctcf$name = paste0(bound_ctcf$V21,":", bound_ctcf$V22,":", bound_ctcf$V23)
for (i in 1:nrow(bound_ctcf)) {
  bound_ctcf[i,44:55] = joint_methyl[joint_methyl$region_name == bound_ctcf$name[i],5:16]
}

bound = bound_ctcf[,4:16]
#rownames(bound) = bound_ctcf$name
ctcf = bound_ctcf[,24:35]
#rownames(ctcf) = bound_ctcf$name
methyl = bound_ctcf[,44:55]

scaled_bound = t(scale(t(as.matrix(bound))))
#temp = bound_ctcf[roworder,]
scaled_ctcf = t(scale(t(as.matrix(ctcf))))
scaled_methyl = t(scale(t(as.matrix(methyl))))

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
heatmap_TAD = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_bound),
                                      col = col_fun,
                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                      name="boundary_deltaDI",
                                      cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                      row_title = NULL,
                                      use_raster = FALSE,
                                      border = TRUE)
heatmap_TAD

roworder = row_order(heatmap_TAD)

scaled_ctcf = scaled_ctcf[roworder,]

heatmap_ctcf = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_ctcf),
                                      col = col_fun,
                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                      name="boundary_deltaDI",
                                      cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                      row_title = NULL,
                                      use_raster = FALSE,
                                      border = TRUE)
heatmap_ctcf

scaled_methyl = scaled_methyl[roworder,]

heatmap_methyl = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_methyl),
                                       col = col_fun,
                                       show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                       name="boundary_deltaDI",
                                       cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                       cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                       row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                       row_title = NULL,
                                       use_raster = FALSE,
                                       border = TRUE)
heatmap_methyl

bound_mega = data.frame("B36_DMSO"=(bound_ctcf[,4] + bound_ctcf[,5])/2,
                             "B36_DP" = (bound_ctcf[,6] + bound_ctcf[,7])/2,
                             "B49_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf[,8] + bound_ctcf[,9])/2,
                             "B49_DP" = (bound_ctcf[,10] + bound_ctcf[,11])/2,
                             "B66_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf[,12] + bound_ctcf[,13])/2,
                             "B66_DP" = (bound_ctcf[,14] + bound_ctcf[,15] + bound_ctcf[,16])/3)

ctcf_mega = data.frame("B36_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf[,24] + bound_ctcf[,25])/2,
                        "B36_DP" = (bound_ctcf[,26] + bound_ctcf[,27])/2,
                        "B49_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf[,28] + bound_ctcf[,29])/2,
                        "B49_DP" = (bound_ctcf[,30] + bound_ctcf[,31])/2,
                        "B66_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf[,32] + bound_ctcf[,33])/2,
                        "B66_DP" = (bound_ctcf[,34] + bound_ctcf[,35])/2)

scaled_bound = t(scale(t(as.matrix(bound_mega))))
scaled_ctcf = t(scale(t(as.matrix(ctcf_mega))))

pdf("tad_bd_ctcf.DI_delta_mega_zscore.pdf",height=5,width=4)
col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
heatmap_TAD = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_bound),
                                      col = col_fun,
                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                      name="Boundary_deltaDI",
                                      cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                      row_title = NULL,
                                      use_raster = FALSE,
                                      border = TRUE)
print(heatmap_TAD)
dev.off()

roworder = row_order(heatmap_TAD)

scaled_ctcf = scaled_ctcf[roworder,]

pdf("tad_bd_ctcf.ctcf_mega_zscore.pdf",height=6,width=3.5)
col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
heatmap_ctcf = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_ctcf),
                                       col = col_fun,
                                       show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                       name="CTCF_ZScore",
                                       cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                       cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                       row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                       row_title = NULL,
                                       use_raster = FALSE,
                                       border = TRUE)
print(heatmap_ctcf)
dev.off()

scaled_bound = t(scale(t(as.matrix(bound_mega))))
scaled_ctcf = t(scale(t(as.matrix(ctcf_mega))))

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
heatmap_TAD = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_bound),
                                      col = col_fun,
                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                      name="Boundary_deltaDI",
                                      cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                      row_title = NULL,
                                      use_raster = FALSE,
                                      border = TRUE)
print(heatmap_TAD)

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("darkblue", "white", "darkred"))
heatmap_ctcf = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_ctcf),
                                       col = col_fun,
                                       show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                       name="CTCF_ZScore",
                                       cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                       cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                       row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                       row_title = NULL,
                                       use_raster = FALSE,
                                       border = TRUE)
print(heatmap_ctcf)



pdf("tad_bd_ctcf.DI_delta_ctcf_mega_zscore.pdf",height=5,width=6)
print(heatmap_TAD+heatmap_ctcf)
dev.off()









all_ctcf = read.csv("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/3_TAD_CTCF/csv_outputs/GSC_cutrun_joint_counts_sig_DEG.csv")
all_ctcf = all_ctcf[,2:13]
scaled_all_ctcf = t(scale(t(as.matrix(all_ctcf))))
heatmap_all_ctcf = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_all_ctcf),
                                      col = col_fun,
                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                      name="boundary_deltaDI",
                                      cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                      row_title = NULL,
                                      use_raster = FALSE,
                                      border = TRUE)
heatmap_all_ctcf


#8_TE_overlap/TAD.CTCF.metrics.txt 
#File	TADs	with_up_peak	with_down_peak	any_diff_peak	No_diff_peak  Both
#dynamic_strengthened_sig_slop50kb.bed	599	315	40	340	259 15
#dynamic_weakened_sig_slop50kb.bed	602	139	156	262	340 33
#not_dynamic_sig_slop50kb.bed	5308	1449	693	1975	3333  167

bound_type <- c(rep("DP_specific",4), rep("DMSO_specific",4), rep("static",4))
peak_type <- c(rep(c("DP_specific","DMSO_specific","Both","Neither"),3))
value <- c(315-15,40-15,15,259,
           139-33,156-33,33,340,
           1449-167,693-167,167,3333)
#lab <- c("TAD Boundaries", "TAD Boundaries", "TAD Boundaries")
data <- data.frame(value,bound_type, peak_type)
data$bound_type <- factor(data$bound_type, levels=c("static", "DMSO_specific", "DP_specific"))
data$peak_type <- factor(data$peak_type, levels=c("DP_specific","Both","DMSO_specific","Neither"))

pdf("tad_bd.class.ctcf.class.pdf",height=5,width=5)
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=bound_type, y=value, fill=peak_type)) + geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.7) + 
  xlab(NULL) + ylab("Percent of TAD Boundaries") + ylim(0,7000) + 
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#f44336","purple","#3d85c6","#F6caba")) + 
  labs(fill="Peak Type")
print(p)
dev.off()


#8_TE_overlap/TE_summits/TAD.CTCF.TE.metrics.txt 
#File	Num_diff_peaks	TE_diff_peaks	LINE	SINE	LTR	DNA
#dynamic_strengthened_sig_slop50kb.bed	340	295	79	138	84	44
#dynamic_weakened_sig_slop50kb.bed	262	204	55	96	50	35
#not_dynamic_sig_slop50kb.bed	1975	1626	473	767	447	274
bound_type <- c(rep("DP_specific",2), rep("DMSO_specific",2), rep("static",2))
te_type <- c(rep(c("TE","No_TE"),3))
value <- c(295,340-295,
           204,262-204,
           1626,1975-1626)
#lab <- c("TAD Boundaries", "TAD Boundaries", "TAD Boundaries")
data <- data.frame(value,bound_type, te_type)
data$bound_type <- factor(data$bound_type, levels=c("static", "DMSO_specific", "DP_specific"))
data$te_type <- factor(data$te_type, levels=c("No_TE","TE"))

#pdf("tad_bd.class.ctcf.class.pdf",height=5,width=5)
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=bound_type, y=value, fill=te_type)) + geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.7) + 
  xlab(NULL) + ylab("Percent of Diff Peaks") + ylim(0,7000) + 
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#F6caba","#f44336")) + 
  labs(fill="TE Type")
print(p)
#dev.off()

bound_type <- c(rep("DP_specific",4), rep("DMSO_specific",4), rep("static",4))
te_type <- c(rep(c("LINE","SINE","LTR","DNA"),3))
value <- c(79,138,84,44,
           55,96,50,35,
           473,767,447,274)
#lab <- c("TAD Boundaries", "TAD Boundaries", "TAD Boundaries")
data <- data.frame(value,bound_type, te_type)
data$bound_type <- factor(data$bound_type, levels=c("static", "DMSO_specific", "DP_specific"))
data$te_type <- factor(data$te_type, levels=c("LINE","SINE","LTR","DNA"))

#pdf("tad_bd.class.ctcf.class.pdf",height=5,width=5)
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=bound_type, y=value, fill=te_type)) + geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.7) + 
  xlab(NULL) + ylab("Percent of Diff Peaks") + ylim(0,7000) + 
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#f44336","purple","#3d85c6","#F6caba")) + 
  labs(fill="TE Type")
print(p)
#dev.off()


```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
